slides.title: Know your numbers, *guide your habits*.
slides.sub: Tracking a few key health numbers is the meta-habit that ties everything together. It is where lasting change begins.

slides.title: You can't improve the unseen
slides.body: It is hard to change what you never measure. Seeing your numbers *can turn* vague goals into clear ones.

slides.title: The few numbers that count
slides.body: Sleep, movement, food and steps cover most of daily health. A handful of numbers *can tell* the story.

slides.title: Tracking makes habits stick
slides.body: Watching a number nudges you to act. That gentle feedback loop *may help* habits hold over time.

slides.title: One place beats five apps
slides.body: Scattered across apps, your numbers get ignored. One clear view *makes it easier* to actually use them.

slides.title: Start by seeing it
slides.body: Pick one place to watch the basics. Once you can see your habits, change *gets a lot* easier.

slides.title: See it all in *one number*.
slides.body: Vibe Health turns your sleep, food, movement and steps into one simple daily score, so your habits finally stick.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
You cannot improve what you never see. 🌿

Sleep, movement, food and steps are the numbers that matter, and tracking them in one place is what makes habits actually stick. One view beats five apps. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those numbers into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: Why Tracking Your Health Numbers Is the Habit That Ties It All Together
